title: tephrosia colutea var. dembianensis
intro: Tephrosia colutea var. dembianensis, also known as Dembian bean, is a plant species that belongs to the Fabaceae family. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a diuretic and to treat kidney problems. Tephrosia colutea var. dembianensis can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used for medicinal purposes, although it is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
